name: Iso11783OPSelectColorMap
title: Iso11783OPSelectColorMap
syntax: long Iso11783OPSelectColorMap( dword ecuHandle, dword colorMapID );
description: The function selects a color map object. A Select Color Map command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
